message:
🌱 vault: PATCH API needed for updating multiple secrets stored at a single URI path (#1109)

* 🌱 Add vault: PATCH API needed for updating multiple secrets stored at a mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vault-1468 mission: correct resolution to reflect PATCH KV v2 support

The resolution incorrectly quoted a rejection comment ("it's not going to
happen") but the feature WAS implemented via PR #12687 (merged Oct 2021).
Updated resolution summary, step 3, and added PR link to sourceUrls.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
